empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out about my order, <ORDER_ID>, for <PRODUCT>, which was supposed to arrive three weeks ago. Unfortunately, I still haven't received it, and I haven't gotten any updates from the courier. Please could you look into this and let me know when I can expect to receive my chair, or if there's an option for a refund so I can purchase one locally? I'd really appreciate your help with this, thank you.
